description_long: This is a stylized cowboy doll with a black wide-brimmed hat, a red and white plaid shirt, and black-and-white cowhide-patterned vest and pants. The doll's face is painted with exaggerated, almost skeletal features, including dark eye sockets and a wide, toothy grin, giving it a slightly eerie appearance. It wears a black neckerchief, a large silver belt buckle, and black cowboy boots with spurs. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands are pale with red markings. The doll has a holster on its right hip and a visible bandana tied at the back of the neck. The overall look is reminiscent of a Western or cowboy theme with a unique, slightly macabre twist.
description: A cowboy-themed doll with a black hat, plaid shirt, cowhide vest and pants, and exaggerated skeletal facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, black hat, red plaid shirt, cowhide vest, belt buckle, and holster.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, facial features, holster, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, bandana, cowhide-patterned vest and pants, and spurs on the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the face, hat, and the right arm with red markings.
attribute_clothing_style: Western cowboy attire with a black wide-brimmed hat, red and white plaid long-sleeve shirt, black-and-white cowhide vest and pants, black neckerchief, large silver belt buckle, black cowboy boots with spurs, and a holster.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: The face has a wide, toothy grin with dark, hollow eye sockets and no visible eyebrows, giving a fixed, eerie expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered by a black cowboy hat.
